metadata.description: Agent-native skills for MA2H (the Multi-agent to Human Protocol) — implement a Hub, build app-specific notify / ask / task sender skills, and build an inbox-drain skill for human->agent directives (v0.4), all wired to your MA2H Hub.

plugins.name: ma2h-skills
plugins.description: Agent-native MA2H toolkit: 'implement' builds a conformant MA2H Hub in your app (any stack); 'build-notify' / 'build-ask' / 'build-task' generate app-specific sender skills; 'build-inbox' generates the agent-side skill to drain human->agent directives (v0.4 inbound leg). Independent — use only what you need.
